name: Pico Bolivar con Uro Adventure
description: The highest peak in Venezuela — a serious multi-day climb for couples and small groups with certified guides, full gear, camping at Domingo Pena's historic base, and teleferico access. Not for beginners, but unforgettable. Requires good physical condition and altitude tolerance. The route passes through paramo landscape with frailejones and stunning views of the Sierra Nevada. This is a high-mountain trekking experience with daily ascents, rocky passages, and high-summit zones. Uro Adventure is dedicated to promoting ecotourism, rural community tourism, and adventure experiences with a genuine commitment to environmental preservation.
best_for: Experienced hikers, couples seeking adventure, small groups with good physical fitness
includes: Personalized pre-excursion attention, certified mountain guides, assistant guide, complete meals for clients and staff, teleferico tickets for guides, backpacks, camping and climbing gear, emergency medical aid, radio communications, INPARQUES permits, camping area at Casa de Domingo Pena
price_range: $615 regular / $492 with discount per person (for 2 people)
season: Year-round. In low season, climb must be Thursday-Sunday (teleferico Mukumbari schedule). Reservations at least 22 days in advance, 50% deposit required.
address: Merida, Venezuela (Pico Bolivar via Teleferico Mukumbari)
policies: Reservations 22+ days in advance. 50% deposit required, balance due day before. Payment in USD cash or Zelle. Budget may vary if client adds/removes services. Client carries personal gear and collaborates with cooking logistics.

name: Autana Tepuy con Cruz de Bolivar
description: 8-day deep jungle expedition to the legendary Autana Tepuy, known as the 'Tree of Life,' navigating the Orinoco, Sipapo and Autana rivers. Visit indigenous communities (Boca de Autana and Ceguera), swim in the sacred Lago Leopoldo, bathe in the jacuzzis of Salto El Zorro, and summit Cerro Wajari for the most iconic jungle view. Includes flights Caracas-Puerto Ayacucho-Caracas, all river/land transfers, complete meals, specialized guides, flexible accommodation (posada nights, tent camping, and traditional hammock stays). Optional Amazonian tasting includes local fruits, fresh fish, and traditional tarantula alongside hunting techniques.
best_for: Adventure seekers, nature photographers, cultural travelers, those seeking truly remote experiences
includes: Round-trip flights Caracas-Puerto Ayacucho, all transfers (air, land, river), complete meals, specialized guides, posada accommodation, tent camping, hammocks with mosquito nets, Cerro Wajari ascent, Lago Leopoldo visit, Salto El Zorro jacuzzis, indigenous community cultural exchange
season: Recurring dates available (e.g., April 7-14, September 7-14). Best during dry season. Subject to minimum group size.
address: Nro 31 calle 7 c/c calle Santa Teresa, Santa Fe, Vista Hermosa, Ciudad Bolivar 8001, Estado Bolivar, Venezuela
policies: Activity confirmed upon reaching minimum participants; otherwise rescheduled. Use fast-dry clothing, sturdy mountain shoes, strong repellent. Respect indigenous customs absolutely. Navigation times subject to weather/river conditions for safety.

name: Roraima con Cruz de Bolivar
description: 6-day all-inclusive expedition to the summit of the ancient Roraima tepuy — the inspiration for Conan Doyle's 'Lost World.' Traverse the majestic Gran Sabana with air-conditioned transport from Ciudad Bolivar or Puerto Ordaz, specialized guides, a cook, fully equipped camps, and portable bathroom. The summit is a surreal landscape of rock formations, crystal pools, and endemic species found nowhere else on Earth. One of the most iconic treks in South America, designed for those seeking to connect with the ancestral energy of Venezuela's tepuyes.
duration: 6 days / 5 nights (May & July promos) or 7 days / 6 nights (June promo)
best_for: Trekkers, photographers, bucket-list travelers, groups seeking an iconic South American adventure
includes: Round-trip transfer from Ciudad Bolivar/Puerto Ordaz in A/C vehicles, all meals, tents, portable bathroom, guides, cook, official Cruz de Bolivar wristbands and permits, first aid kit, posada accommodation in Gran Sabana
season: Recurring dates (May 11-16, June 2-8, July 26-31, August 5-24). Year-round possible, clearest views December-March.
address: Nro 31 calle 7 c/c calle Santa Teresa, Santa Fe, Vista Hermosa, Ciudad Bolivar 8001, Estado Bolivar, Venezuela
policies: Departure at 4:30 AM — mandatory overnight in Puerto Ordaz or Ciudad Bolivar. Limited spots. Vegetarian/vegan menu available with surcharge and prior notice. Personal porter service optional (direct arrangement with indigenous locals). Refunds possible up to 7 days before. Client responsible for cancellations/abandonment due to personal decision or injury. Bring cash, sturdy shoes, waterproof jacket, sleeping bag, warm clothing (6-15C), headlamp, personal medicine.

name: Cascada 7 Pisos con Cruz de Bolivar
description: A 2-day nature, beach, and culture road trip through eastern Venezuela combining the spectacular 7-tier Cascada 7 Pisos waterfall, Parque La Sirena, Playa Colorada, Playa Lido, El Morro, and the historic Casa Fuerte in Barcelona. Overnight in a posada with ocean views in Mochima. Includes transport, meals, lodging, guides, and hydration. Special stops along the route for local sweets, casabe, and tropical fruits. Departs early morning from Altamira, Caracas. A.C. Cruz de Bolivar promotes civic values and sustainable community development through participatory tourism initiatives.
best_for: Travelers seeking soft adventure, beaches, natural landscapes, guided logistics, families, couples, first-time visitors to eastern Venezuela
includes: Round-trip transport from Altamira (Caracas), 2 lunches, 1 breakfast, 1 night posada accommodation with ocean view, professional guides, hydration
season: Recurring dates (e.g., May 7-17). Year-round, best weather December-April.
address: Departure from Altamira, Caracas. Office: Nro 31 calle 7 c/c calle Santa Teresa, Santa Fe, Vista Hermosa, Ciudad Bolivar 8001, Estado Bolivar, Venezuela
policies: Early departure from Altamira — punctuality recommended. Payment via PayPal (eloyrcer@gmail.com), Banesco USD account, or Zelle (by consultation). No direct cash payment accepted. 4 spots available per departure.

name: Free Tour Centro Historico de Caracas — El Guia Tour
description: A 3.5-hour walking tour through 19th-century 'afrancesado' Caracas exploring how President Antonio Guzman Blanco transformed the capital to resemble Paris. Visit the Basilica de Santa Teresa y Santa Ana, Teatro Municipal, Plaza Caracas, Complejo Neogotico, Palacio Federal Legislativo, Plaza Bolivar, Basilica Menor de Santa Capilla, and Panteon Nacional. Pioneers of the free tour model in Venezuela — you pay what you feel the experience was worth as a tip. Learn about the era when families would pawn belongings to buy clothes and attend theater, when pachuli became fashionable, and Caracas began its transformation from rural to urban.
best_for: History lovers, first-time visitors to Caracas, culture enthusiasts, solo travelers, budget travelers
includes: Professional heritage guide accompaniment, historical/patrimonial interpretation service
season: Year-round (dates vary monthly, e.g., August 31, 2025). Morning tours starting 9:00 AM.
address: Meeting point: Plaza Diego Ibarra (Centro Simon Bolivar). End point: Panteon Nacional.
policies: Bring hydration, wear comfortable walking shoes, arrive 10 minutes early, be willing to share in group. Tips for guides are the engine that keeps this cultural work alive. 15 spots per tour.

name: El Calvario Heritage Walk — El Guia Tour
description: A 3.5 to 4-hour heritage walk through El Calvario park in Caracas. Discover monuments to Ezequiel Zamora, Cacique Carapaica, Jose Francisco Bermudez, Miguel de Cervantes, and Jose Gregorio Hernandez, plus busts of Jose Joaquin de Olmedo, Teresa Carreno, and Pedro Elias Gutierrez (with a story about 'El Alma Llanera'). Visit Plaza El Parnaso, Plaza Reloj, Plaza Bolivar del Calvario, the Gazebo, Mirador overlooking Centro Simon Bolivar, Capilla Nuestra Senora de Lourdes, and the iconic Arco Federacion with panoramic city views. Reserve for just one euro and then tip your guides based on the value you feel the experience provided.
best_for: History lovers, architecture enthusiasts, groups of 10+, culture seekers, photography enthusiasts
includes: Professional heritage guide accompaniment, patrimonial interpretation service throughout the walk
price_range: 1 EUR reservation fee + tips (pay what you feel)
season: Year-round (e.g., Sundays May 3-24, September 14, 2025). Tours at 9:00 AM.
address: Meeting point: lower staircase of El Calvario park, Caracas.
policies: Activity confirmed with minimum 10 reservations. Once reserved, you'll receive WhatsApp confirmation the day before with details. Bring hydration, wear comfortable clothing and shoes. Your tips sustain accessible tourism through El Guia Tour.

name: Bequeve Los Roques All-Inclusive Posada
location: Los Roques, Territorio Federal Francisco de Miranda
description: All-inclusive posada just 50 meters from the sea in Los Roques archipelago, an architectural gem designed by renowned Venezuelan architect Fruto Vivas (National Architecture Prize winner). Beautiful fresh rooms with A/C, subscription TV, streaming, and satellite Wi-Fi. Modern hydropneumatic system ensures water pressure. Committed to environmental preservation of the National Park as an ecological tourism destination. Each room/suite has a safe. Check-in/out flexible based on flight itinerary. No individual rooms — minimum double occupancy with king or queen beds.
duration: Multi-day stay (Monday to Thursday, check-out obligatory Thursdays)
best_for: Beach lovers, couples, snorkelers, families, relaxation seekers, eco-conscious travelers
includes: All-inclusive plan: breakfast, lunch, 2-course dinner, snacks, beach service with refreshments (water, soda, 2 beers daily per person), snorkel equipment, excursions to nearby and intermediate cayos on 29-foot boat
season: Available Monday-Thursday (next 3 months: July, August, September). Year-round destination, best December-April.
address: Calle Los Uveros, behind the chapel of Los Roques, Gran Roque, 50 meters from the sea. Parque Nacional Archipielago Los Roques, Territorio Federal Francisco de Miranda, Venezuela.
policies: Cancel 30 days to 1 week before: 1 night penalty, remainder as credit note. Cancel less than 7 days: NO SHOW. No refunds. Payment 48h before check-in, full payment before arrival. No payments accepted at posada. No pets. No food/alcohol in rooms. No smoking. Quiet hours from 10 PM. Exclusive for guests only. Not responsible for luggage/valuables.

name: Bequeve Choroni Colonial Lodge
description: Colonial-style lodge in the serene setting of Puerto Colombia, offering a unique stay in two beautifully designed houses. The Original House features two captivating suites blending colonial elegance with contemporary comfort, where nature's embrace lets you relax to birdsong and flowing rivers. The New House presents modern suites with A/C, mini-fridges, hot water, subscription TV, satellite internet, and complimentary satellite Wi-Fi. All rooms are spacious suites with king or queen beds, minimum double occupancy. Check-in before 6 PM (dinner served at 8 PM), Check-out at 4 PM.
duration: Multi-day stay (Monday to Thursday, check-out obligatory Thursdays)
best_for: Couples, culture lovers, beach and nature seekers, colonial architecture fans, those seeking tranquility
includes: Main plan: breakfast, merienda (afternoon snack), 2-course dinner, national beverages (water, soda, 1 daily beer per person, 1 wine uncorking per dinner)
season: Available Monday-Thursday (next 3 months: July, August, September). Year-round, best December-April.
address: Puerto Colombia, Sector Dos Rios, at the end of the unpaved street in front of the gas station (beside the Choroni Terminal). Aragua, Venezuela.
policies: Cancel 30 days to 1 week before: 1 night penalty, remainder as credit note. Cancel less than 7 days: NO SHOW. No refunds. Payment 48h before check-in, full payment before arrival. No payments accepted at posada. Contact via WhatsApp after payment to reconfirm. No pets. No food/alcohol in rooms. No smoking. Quiet hours from 10 PM. Exclusive for guests.

name: Petare Deslumbrante — Cosmo Brutal
description: A 4-hour immersive walking tour discovering the colonial and artistic heritage of Petare, one of Caracas' most vibrant and misunderstood neighborhoods. Starting and ending at Unicentro El Marques, the route uses the Caracas Metro to connect with the historic center. Visit Plaza Sucre and the Dulce Nombre de Jesus Church, explore the picturesque Callejon Z and Iglesia El Calvario facade, tour the Barbaro Rivas Museum and artist David Petit's house-workshop. The tour reveals the creative expressions that define the visual history of the zone, offering a renewed perspective on the memory and vibrant daily life that coexist in this historic corner. Led by Rodrigo Capriles, a specialist in narrating the hidden stories of Caracas architecture and culture.
best_for: Urban explorers, art lovers, cultural travelers, photography enthusiasts, those seeking authentic local experiences
includes: Specialized heritage guide, transport costs during activity (metro/mototaxi), exclusive access management at historic and artistic stops
season: Limited time availability (e.g., March 20 - April 19). 9 AM - 1 PM. 10 spots per tour.
address: Meeting point: Unicentro El Marques, Caracas. Route: Casco Historico de Petare.
policies: Subject to rescheduling for logistic contingencies or insufficient quorum. No date changes for minor weather (light rain). Does not include food/drinks (bring light snacks). Do not climb monuments. Wear long pants and sleeved shirts (required for religious temples). Avoid jewelry/valuables. Bring water, sunscreen, umbrella, charged camera. Nearby parking ~$4.

name: Salto Duruhuaya con Cruz de Bolivar
description: An unforgettable adventure in the heart of Bolivar State exploring incredible landscapes, majestic waterfalls, and crystalline rivers that connect you with nature at its fullest expression. The Salto Duruhuaya expedition takes you deep into pristine wilderness with both land and river transfers, complete meals, camping in tents and hammocks with mosquito nets, and expert guides throughout. Departures from both Caracas and Ciudad Bolivar available. Live an experience you'll remember for a lifetime.
best_for: Nature lovers, waterfall enthusiasts, adventure seekers, those wanting deep jungle immersion
includes: Land and river transfers, complete meals, tents and hammocks with mosquito nets, expert guides throughout the journey
season: October 18-23 (recurring). Departure from Caracas and Ciudad Bolivar.
address: Nro 31 calle 7 c/c calle Santa Teresa, Santa Fe, Vista Hermosa, Ciudad Bolivar 8001, Estado Bolivar, Venezuela
policies: Payment via PayPal (eloyrcer@gmail.com), Banesco USD account, or Zelle (by consultation). No direct cash payment accepted. 1 spot per booking.

name: Estancia La Canada — Paramo Merideño
description: The best in mountain tourism in the Venezuelan Andes. Comfortable accommodation in the Merida paramo, offering a magical and unique environment beyond the mountains. Stay in the Galeria La Manita with 4 cozy rooms, enjoying a magical highland atmosphere surrounded by the unique paramo landscape found only in Venezuela's Andes. Includes breakfast for 2 people. Perfect for those seeking a peaceful retreat in one of Venezuela's most stunning highland ecosystems.
best_for: Couples, nature lovers, mountain enthusiasts, those seeking peaceful highland retreats, birdwatchers
includes: Accommodation in Galeria La Manita rooms, breakfast for 2 people
price_range: 55 EUR regular / 44 EUR with discount per night (breakfast only plan, for 2 people)
season: Available November 24 - December 15, 2025. 4 rooms available.
address: Paramo Merideño, Merida, Venezuela
policies: Direct cash payment accepted. Limited to 4 rooms. Plan is for 2 people.

name: Hacienda La Concepcion — Full Spa Wellness Retreat
description: A holistic wellness sanctuary set on 50 hectares of lush ethnobotanical gardens. More than a hotel and spa — a healing retreat combining luxury accommodation with nature's wisdom and specialized therapies. The Full Spa day includes welcome cocktail, full meals (100% vegetarian, nutritious menu), unlimited access to sauna, steam room, jacuzzi, pool and gardens. Treatments include the purifying 4 Elements Therapy (exfoliation, mud therapy, hydromassage) plus choice of relaxing massage or facial cleansing. Meditation, yoga sessions, and live music complete the experience. Guided by Dr. Efrain Hoffmann's healing approach combining ecological vision, Hoffmann Healing Diets, and technology-free spaces for mind-body-spirit balance.
duration: Full day (check-in 2 PM, check-out 12 PM, facilities available all day)
best_for: Wellness seekers, couples, spa lovers, yoga practitioners, those needing deep relaxation and holistic healing
includes: Welcome cocktail, breakfast/lunch/dinner (100% vegetarian), sauna, steam room, jacuzzi, pool, gardens, 4 Elements Therapy (exfoliation, mud therapy, hydromassage), relaxing massage OR facial cleansing, meditation sessions, yoga sessions, live music
price_range: $198.30 regular / 35% off Sun-Thu, 20% off weekends (for 2 people max)
season: Available September 4 - December 4. Recurring availability.
address: Hacienda La Concepcion, Aguirre, Carabobo, Venezuela, 2042
policies: Cancel same day: lose 100% of payment. Cancel with at least 1 day notice: can reschedule to future date. Check-in 2 PM, check-out 12 PM (facilities available rest of day after checkout). Max 2 people per plan. 5 spots available.

name: Waku Lodge — Canaima All-Inclusive
description: Exclusive lodging on the Canaima Lagoon surrounded by tepuyes and waterfalls, with 40+ years of sustainable tourism experience. All-inclusive packages include round-trip flights Caracas-Canaima, internal transfers, lagoon-front accommodation, full board (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks), and guided excursions to Angel Falls (overnight in hammocks), Salto Sapo, Salto Hacha, kayak session, and Pemon indigenous community visit. Optional helicopter overflights, trekking, and special excursions available. First-class hospitality with direct Pemon cultural contact, ensuring comfort, safety, and positive community impact.
best_for: Nature lovers, waterfall enthusiasts, cultural travelers, photographers, bucket-list travelers seeking Angel Falls
includes: Round-trip flights Caracas-Canaima-Caracas, internal transfers, lagoon-front accommodation, full board (all meals + snacks), guided excursions to Angel Falls (overnight), Salto Sapo, Salto Hacha, 1-hour kayak session, Pemon community visit
season: Available year-round (sample dates: October-August). Schedules subject to weather and logistics.
address: Parque Nacional Canaima, Estado Bolivar, Venezuela
policies: Cancel 14+ days before: reschedule without penalty. Cancel 14-7 days before: first night charged. Cancel 7 days or less: 100% charged, no changes. Non-refundable but transferable to another person (except flights) within 6 months. Unused services non-refundable. Park entry fee: $40 adults / $20 children (cash on arrival). Bring valid ID/passport. Payment via Zelle, Revolut, Wise, wire/ACH in USD, or bolivar transfer. No international credit cards.

name: Walking Tour Centro Historico — Legatum Tour
description: A walking tour through the Historic Center of Caracas offering internal and external visits to various heritage sites in the central district. Discover the most emblematic places of the 'Caracas de los techos rojos' (red-roofed Caracas) with a homogeneous and comprehensive vision of the historic center. Led by certified tourism guide Deyanira Garcia, specializing in cultural heritage interpretation. Perfect for understanding the layered history of Venezuela's capital from colonial times to the present.
best_for: Culture enthusiasts, history buffs, walking tour lovers, solo travelers, groups up to 20 people
includes: Professional tourism guide, heritage interpretation, visits to internal and external patrimonial sites
season: Year-round (except December 24, 31 and January 1-2). Wednesday to Friday at 10 AM.
address: Av. Luis Razzetti, Casa N010, Caracas
policies: Cancellation with minimum 10 hours notice. Available for 1-20 people. 15 spots per tour.

name: Trekking Paraiso del Avila — Viaja Verde
description: Trekking experience to the Paraiso sector of El Avila (Waraira Repano National Park), reaching stunning waterfalls and natural pools in the mountain. The route traverses the Estribo de Duarte sector with beautiful views of Caracas, enters the lush mountain forest, and offers observation of diverse flora and fauna species before arriving at a refreshing natural spring water pool for swimming. A sustainable tourism operator with 14 years of experience in specialized trips throughout Venezuela.
best_for: Nature lovers, hikers, those seeking a quick escape from Caracas, fitness enthusiasts, birdwatchers
includes: Specialized guide for the trekking route
season: Year-round on Saturdays and Sundays. Book Monday-Thursday for weekend departure. Coordinate with guide the day before.
address: Los Chorros, Calle Aristide Calvani, Qta. San Remo, Caracas
policies: Coordinate meeting point with guide the day before. 10 spots available. Direct cash payment accepted.

name: Dia Mundial de las Playas — Viaja Verde
description: Join the 10th edition of the beach cleanup day — a collective action to restore the natural beauty of Venezuela's coastline. More than just a cleanup, it's a commitment to the future and an opportunity to reconnect with nature. The day includes transport from Caracas (Chuao) to Complejo Vacacional Los Caracas and Playa Anare, hydration, refreshments, raffles and activities, a 'Connecting Experiences' discussion, yoga and surf classes, and interaction with allied projects. A sustainable tourism initiative demonstrating that every gesture counts.
best_for: Eco-conscious travelers, families, groups, volunteers, beach lovers wanting to give back
includes: Round-trip transport from Caracas (Chuao - The Place), hydration, refreshments, raffles, activities, yoga class, surf class, discussion session
season: Annual event — September 20, 2025. One-time special event.
address: Pickup: Calle Santa Cruz, Chuao, Caracas (The Place). Destination: Complejo Vacacional Los Caracas / Playa Anare.
policies: Limited to 60 spots. Bring sunscreen, water bottle, change of clothes, hat, swimsuit, UV shirt. Direct cash payment accepted.

name: Posada Lagunita — Los Roques
description: A cozy Mediterranean-style posada in the picturesque Gran Roque village, offering personalized service that makes you feel at home from the moment you arrive. Comfortable rooms with A/C, hot water, and safe box. Features a pleasant open-air terrace and dining area serving exquisite gastronomy based on fresh fish and exotic flavors. Located in Gran Roque as the perfect base for daily adventures in crystal-clear turquoise waters, spectacular white sand beaches, ideal temperatures, and unique marine biodiversity. Los Roques is a Caribbean treasure that takes your breath away from the moment you fly over the coral barrier.
best_for: Beach lovers, couples, snorkelers, marine life enthusiasts, those seeking Caribbean luxury with personal service
includes: Accommodation, airport assistance in Los Roques, luggage transfer to/from airport, boat transfer to nearby islands (Madrisqui or Francisqui), beach umbrella/chairs/towels daily, cool box with refreshing drinks and beach lunch, snack and drinks upon return from beach, dinner with set menu, flight reconfirmation and airline check-in, complimentary Wi-Fi
price_range: $299/night regular / $254/night with 15% discount per person (does not include flights or taxes)
season: Year-round. Recurring availability. 1 room per product.
address: Calle La Laguna, Casa Nro 153, Zona Isla Grande Roque, Gran Roque, Dependencias Federales, Zona Postal 1201
policies: All cancellations must be in writing via email. Unused nights/services non-refundable. Cancel 5-15 days before: 30% cancellation fee. Cancel 4 days or less: 100% charge. Flight cancellations not their responsibility. Modifications keep paid amount as credit (not the plan) for up to 6 months. Promotional rates: client pays adjustment to current rate upon rescheduling. Does NOT include flights or taxes. Cava/cayo transfer service based on nights contracted.

name: La Plazita de Galipan — Mountain Suite Experience
description: A magical night in Galipan with the highest standards of quality and comfort. Exclusive mountain suites with beautiful views, spacious rooms with private bathrooms, decorated with care where every detail is designed for your rest. Located in San Isidro de Galipan on the mountainside of El Avila National Park overlooking both Caracas and the Caribbean coast. Mountain houses ideal for celebrations, families, couples, friends, and events. An experience to celebrate life with luxury and well-being in a unique mountain setting.
best_for: Couples, families, friends groups, event planners, those seeking mountain luxury near Caracas, romantic getaways
includes: One night in exclusive suite, delicious breakfast, mountain views, private bathroom
season: Available August 1, 2025 to February 1, 2026. Recurring. 2 rooms available per booking.
address: Calle La Gonzalera, San Isidro de Galipan, Estado Vargas, Venezuela
policies: Direct cash payment accepted. 2 inventory spots available. Web: www.plazitashome.co

name: Posada Santa Margarita — Puerto Cabello Colonial
description: A centennial colonial-concept posada with 17 rooms offering all modern comforts in the heart of Puerto Cabello's historic center. One of Venezuela's most important colonial port cities, Puerto Cabello features beautifully preserved architecture, the famous Calle de los Lanceros, Fortín Solano, and Caribbean beaches. The posada offers various room types from matrimonial to quadruple and the special Torreon and Leonardo Matrimonial suites, making it suitable for solo travelers, couples, families, and groups.
best_for: History lovers, couples, families, groups, colonial architecture enthusiasts, beach-goers visiting Puerto Cabello
includes: Colonial-style accommodation with all modern comforts, various room configurations available
price_range: Matrimonial $75/$60, Double $75/$60, Triple $95/$76, Quadruple $105/$84, Torreon $60/$48, Leonardo Matrimonial $95/$76 (regular/discounted, 20% off)
season: Year-round. Mixed availability.
address: Calle Bolivar, Casa Santa Margarita Nro 4-36, Sector Centro Historico, Puerto Cabello, Carabobo, Zona Postal 2050, Venezuela
policies: No pets allowed. Full payment required. No refunds. Rescheduling available in case of emergencies. 5 rooms available. Direct cash payment accepted.

name: Noa Cookies — Artisan Cookie Experience
description: An XXL artisan cookie shop offering surprise cookies at special discounted prices. Located in the Valle Arriba Shopping Center in Caracas, Noa Cookies brings a unique gastronomic experience with their oversized cookies. A perfect sweet stop while exploring Caracas, offering affordable treats in a trendy shopping center setting.
best_for: Foodies, sweet lovers, casual visitors to Caracas shopping areas, those wanting a quick treat
includes: Surprise XXL cookie at 30% discount
season: Tuesdays and Wednesdays, 6:00-6:30 PM only. 5 spots available per session.
address: Urb. Colinas de Valle Arriba, Centro Comercial Valle Arriba, Nivel C1, Local AC-2, Caracas, Miranda, Venezuela
policies: Available only during specified 30-minute window on Tuesdays and Wednesdays. Direct cash payment accepted. Limited to 5 per session.

name: Los Bufalos Padel Club — Dale Pala
description: A padel center with 3 courts located just 2 minutes from La Lagunita with the best view in Caracas. Book a 90-minute court block that includes 4 beers. Perfect for sports enthusiasts looking to combine physical activity with social enjoyment in a scenic setting overlooking the city. A unique recreational experience blending sport and leisure in the Venezuelan capital.
best_for: Sports enthusiasts, social groups, friends, padel players, those seeking active recreation with views
includes: 90-minute court reservation, 4 beers included
season: Year-round. Recurring availability.
address: Near La Lagunita, Caracas, Venezuela
policies: Direct cash payment accepted. 15 spots available. Payment via Bancamiga or Zelle.
